description: Colour block wallet from Linos Perros for the woman of fashion. Match your outfit with one colour on this colour happy piece. This wallet not only adds to your style but also has plenty of organiser space.Length: 19 cmWidth: 9 cmDepth: 2.5 cmDouble coloured sliders on the main compartment zipperOne main compartment with two separators (one zippered of the two)Four card slots and one pocket on both sides of the walletOne zippered pocket at the back with double coloured slidersBrand patch appliqued on the backLeather upper with embossed letters of the brandBranding on the zippersCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
